channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Man Named Loony Toon, Who Shot At Police Officers, Sentenced To 20 Years In Prison

media:content.media:description: Toon convicted of multiple attempted murder counts receives 20-year prison sentence in Oregon.

item.description: Loony John Franklin Kolb Toon gets 20 years for shooting at police during June 2025 traffic stop.
item.content:encoded: Loony John Franklin Kolb Toon gets 20 years for shooting at police during June 2025 traffic stop.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Netanyahu Calls Off Lebanon Strikes After 'Explosive' Call With Trump
item.description: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal
item.content:encoded: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal

item.title: "Everybody Hates You Now": Trump's Brutal Dressing-Down Of Netanyahu

media:content.media:description: Trump also reportedly put the brakes on Israel's plan to strike Beirut.

item.description: US-Iran War Latest News: "You're F***ing Crazy, Would Be In Prison If It Weren't For Me": Trump Lashes Out At Netanyahu Over Lebanon
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1107347/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>US-Iran War Latest News: "You're F***ing Crazy, Would Be In Prison If It Weren't For Me": Trump Lashes Out At Netanyahu Over Lebanon

item.title: US Cuts Agricultural Equipment Tariffs From 25% To 15% Amid Rising Farm Costs

media:content.media:description: Tariffs on agricultural equipment cut to 15% with possible 10% for US steel content, effective June 8.

item.description: Tariffs on agricultural equipment cut to 15% with possible 10% for US steel content, effective June 8.
item.content:encoded: Tariffs on agricultural equipment cut to 15% with possible 10% for US steel content, effective June 8.

item.title: 7, Including Suspect, Killed In Shooting After "Domestic Dispute" In US' Iowa

media:content.media:description: Investigators soon identified the suspected shooter as Ryan Willis McFarland

item.description: 5, Including Suspect, Killed In Shooting After A "Domestic Dispute" In US' Iowa
item.content:encoded: 5, Including Suspect, Killed In Shooting After A "Domestic Dispute" In US' Iowa

item.title: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani Signs 'Cutest' Executive Order Ahead Of NBA Finals: 'No More Bedtimes'

media:content.media:description: Zohran Mamdani signs an order repealing bedtimes during the Knicks' NBA Finals run.

item.description: New York City (NYC) Mayor Zohran Mamdani suspends bedtimes so kids can watch the Knicks in the NBA Finals.
item.content:encoded: New York City (NYC) Mayor Zohran Mamdani suspends bedtimes so kids can watch the Knicks in the NBA Finals.

item.title: Won't Allow Our Territory To Be Used Against India: Myanmar President

media:content.media:description: The President extended a formal invitation to PM Modi to visit Myanmar

item.description: India and Myanmar on Monday pledged to deepen bilateral cooperation across security, trade and infrastructure as Prime Minister Narendra Modi held talks with Myanmar President U Min Aung Hlaing in New Delhi
item.content:encoded: India and Myanmar on Monday pledged to deepen bilateral cooperation across security, trade and infrastructure as Prime Minister Narendra Modi held talks with Myanmar President U Min Aung Hlaing in New Delhi

item.title: Trump's "Eternity" Hope For Israel And Iran-Backed Hezbollah

media:content.media:description: Trump said on his Truth Social network that Hezbollah had "agreed to stop shooting at Israel.

item.description: Trump said on his Truth Social network that Hezbollah had "agreed to stop shooting at Israel, and its soldiers. Likewise, Israel agreed to stop shooting at them. Let's see how long that lasts -- Hopefully it will be for ETERNITY!"
item.content:encoded: Trump said on his Truth Social network that Hezbollah had "agreed to stop shooting at Israel, and its soldiers. Likewise, Israel agreed to stop shooting at them. Let's see how long that lasts -- Hopefully it will be for ETERNITY!"

item.title: Pentagon Bars Journalists From Its Press Office. Here's Why

media:content.media:description: The Department has declared that its press office is now a classified space inaccessible to journalists.

item.description: On X, acting Pentagon press secretary Joel Valdez confirmed the move, saying there was "nothing controversial" about it and that it came because speechwriters, who use classified material, were now occupying the space.
item.content:encoded: On X, acting Pentagon press secretary Joel Valdez confirmed the move, saying there was "nothing controversial" about it and that it came because speechwriters, who use classified material, were now occupying the space.

item.title: 6.1 Magnitude Earthquake Hits Italy
item.description: A 6.1 magnitude earthquake struck off the coast of southern Italy in the early hours of Tuesday, the German Research Centre for Geosciences said. The quake was registered at a depth
item.content:encoded: A 6.1 magnitude earthquake struck off the coast of southern Italy in the early hours of Tuesday, the German Research Centre for Geosciences said. The quake was registered at a depth

item.title: Deal With Iran On Truce, Hormuz Expected "Over The Next Week", Says Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump had earlier said that talks are continuing, at a "rapid pace" with Iran.

item.description: He told ABC News he has thus far withheld final approval on a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) aimed at unblocking the vital shipping lane, explaining, "I still have to get a few more points."
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1107346/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>He told ABC News he has thus far withheld final approval on a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) aimed at unblocking the vital shipping lane, explaining, "I still have to get a few more points."

item.title: Hezbollah Accepts US Proposal For Mutual Halt To Attacks With Israel: Lebanon

media:content.media:description: Lebanon's US embassy said that Hezbollah had accepted a US proposal for a "mutual cessation of attacks".

item.description: Lebanon's embassy in Washington said in a statement on Monday that Hezbollah had accepted a US proposal for a mutual cessation of hostilities that would be extended to encompass all Lebanese territory.
item.content:encoded: Lebanon's embassy in Washington said in a statement on Monday that Hezbollah had accepted a US proposal for a mutual cessation of hostilities that would be extended to encompass all Lebanese territory.

item.title: "Endangering Our Kids": Florida Sues OpenAI Over ChatGPT Safety Risks

media:content.media:description: Florida attorney general faults OpenAI for failing to put in place stricter rules to verify users' ages.

item.description: Florida's attorney general on Monday sued OpenAI and its CEO Sam Altman, accusing the company's ChatGPT chatbot of endangering young users by making them addicted and encouraging harmful behaviors.
item.content:encoded: Florida's attorney general on Monday sued OpenAI and its CEO Sam Altman, accusing the company's ChatGPT chatbot of endangering young users by making them addicted and encouraging harmful behaviors.

item.title: Iran Threatens "New Fronts" In War As Peace Talk Cliffhanger Continues

media:content.media:description: Iran has said it needs the release of $12 billion in frozen assets before engaging in substantive talks.

item.description: Iran's news agency Tasnim reported Tehran had suspended dialogue with mediators in protest at Israel's expanding offensive in Lebanon.
item.content:encoded: Iran's news agency Tasnim reported Tehran had suspended dialogue with mediators in protest at Israel's expanding offensive in Lebanon.

item.title: Man Stuck In 120-Metre Italian Cave Saved By 53 Rescuers

media:content.media:description: The caver was first assisted at a makeshift medical post set up inside the cave.

item.description: The overnight rescue operation took place in the Grotta dei Cinghiali Volanti (Cave of the Flying Wild Boars), one of Italy's main caving areas.
item.content:encoded: The overnight rescue operation took place in the Grotta dei Cinghiali Volanti (Cave of the Flying Wild Boars), one of Italy's main caving areas.

item.title: Russia Bans Aviation Fuel Exports As Ukraine Targets Refineries

media:content.media:description: Ukraine has increased its campaign on Russian energy infrastructure.

item.description: Kyiv has increased attacks on Russian energy facilities in recent weeks, hitting targets as far as the Urals.
item.content:encoded: Kyiv has increased attacks on Russian energy facilities in recent weeks, hitting targets as far as the Urals.

item.title: Iran Suspends US Talks Over Ceasefire Violations "On All Fronts": Report

media:content.media:description: A ceasefire has been in place since April 8 and has held despite occasional incidents.

item.description: Iran was demanding the "immediate cessation" of Israel's military operations in Gaza and Lebanon as a precondition for resuming talks.
item.content:encoded: Iran was demanding the "immediate cessation" of Israel's military operations in Gaza and Lebanon as a precondition for resuming talks.

item.title: Israel Orders Strikes On Beirut As UN Council Gears Up For Emergency Meet

media:content.media:description: Lebanon was dragged into the Middle East war on March 2 when Hezbollah fired rockets towards Israel.

item.description: Israel's Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Defence Minister Israel Katz said they had ordered strikes on Beirut's usually densely populated southern suburbs.
item.content:encoded: Israel's Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Defence Minister Israel Katz said they had ordered strikes on Beirut's usually densely populated southern suburbs.

item.title: Chinese Firm Develops Technology That Uses AI To Predict Future Protestors

media:content.media:description: The technology will generate profiles of Chinese citizens.

item.description: The company, Geedge Networks, sells a commercial version of the surveillance and censorship software used by the Chinese government to control online activity.
item.content:encoded: The company, Geedge Networks, sells a commercial version of the surveillance and censorship software used by the Chinese government to control online activity.

item.title: What Is Palantir's PRISMA, The AI Software Ukraine Is Using To Strike Russia

media:content.media:description: PRISMA is not the first Palantir tool deployed in this conflict. (AI-generated image)

item.description: PRISMA brings together real-time battlefield data, drone flight paths, and AI-assisted analysis into a single operational picture.
item.content:encoded: PRISMA brings together real-time battlefield data, drone flight paths, and AI-assisted analysis into a single operational picture.
